difficulty.reason: Direct sow, vigorous grower, self-sows, blue star flowers attract bees

growth_stages.name: Germination
growth_stages.look_for: Large seed leaves pushing up, hairy stems visible early

prompt.en: See the fuzzy baby plant? Touch it gently -- it's covered in tiny hairs!
prompt.da: Ser du den lodne baby-plante? Roer den forsigtigt -- den er daekket af smaa haar!

growth_stages.name: Vegetative Growth
growth_stages.look_for: Big hairy leaves, sturdy stems, getting bushy

prompt.en: Taste a young leaf -- it tastes like cucumber! The hairs are prickly on big leaves though!
prompt.da: Smag paa et ungt blad -- det smager af agurk! Haarene er prikkende paa store blade dog!

growth_stages.name: Flowering
growth_stages.look_for: Bright blue star-shaped flowers hanging in clusters, bees everywhere

prompt.en: Blue star flowers! Sit still for one minute -- how many bees visit?
prompt.da: Blaa stjerne-blomster! Sid stille i et minut -- hvor mange bier kommer paa besoeg?

prompt.en: Pick blue flowers and put one in each ice cube tray hole -- freeze them for fancy water!
prompt.da: Pluk blaa blomster og laeg en i hvert isterningefelt -- frys dem til flottemandsvand!

human_readable.en: Tolerates dry conditions once established. Water in prolonged drought.
human_readable.da: Taaler toerre forhold naar den er etableret. Vand i laengere toerke.

harvest.notes: Edible flowers: freeze in ice cubes, add to salads. Self-sows prolifically. Cucumber-flavored leaves.

companion_plants.notes: Premier pollinator attractor. Improves strawberry yields. Good companion for all crops.
